schema.document: Root keys: version (number), schema (object, documentation only), blueprint_ref (string, optional pointer), items (array). Validators must allow blueprint_ref.

items.title: Phase 1 — Schemas + ingestion (append-only POST /api/events)
items.bound: shared/schemas + ingest path; DB canonical_events; strict validation, unknown fields rejected; blueprint §2 (services/ingest layout), §4 Event Schema, §14 API, §17 phase 1
items.last_note: Confirm vs existing app.ts + store; mark done only when blueprint Phase 1 criteria met

items.title: Phase 2 — Execution + trace reconstruction
items.bound: trace_engine + lifecycle reducer; ordering, retries, tool/step grouping; blueprint §5–6, §17 phase 2
items.last_note: Depends on phase-01 for event source; may be largely implemented — verify tests

items.title: Phase 3 — FSC eligibility + minimum signal gates (hard pre-classify)
items.bound: PRD §18 FSC + §20 min signal + §21 steps 1–2 only (not full classify); map to INCOMPLETE_EXECUTION / INSUFFICIENT_SIGNAL; code: services/gates or execution_disclosure; blueprint §7 FSC, §8 Min Signal (§12 suppression wiring continues in phase-05)
items.last_note: Primary PRD gap; INCOMPLETE_EXECUTION vs INSUFFICIENT_SIGNAL before any pattern logic

items.title: Phase 4 — Signal detection + threshold calibration (internal numeric)
items.bound: execution_signals + workflow_baseline: rolling N=200 per workflow, P25/P75; categories LOW/NORMAL/HIGH internal; no numeric API leak; blueprint §9–10
items.last_note: After phase-03 stable; supersedes calendar-only baseline if still present

items.title: Phase 5 — Deterministic pattern classification + suppression pipeline
items.bound: behavioral_patterns + suppression: priority order, mutual exclusion, ambiguity → AMBIGUITY; no inference/ML on product path; blueprint §11–12
items.last_note: Wire full §21 hierarchy; audit log optional per blueprint §15

items.title: Phase 6 — Workflow aggregation + observability API
items.bound: observability_aggregate + GET /api/observability/:orgId; workflow-level only; cohort suppression; blueprint §13–14
items.last_note: No trends, ranks, scores, raw thresholds in responses

items.title: Phase 7 — Tests, harness verify, governance regression
items.bound: harness/scripts/verify.sh; harness/feature_list.json passes per docs/agent/EVALUATION.md; blueprint §16 + forbidden-field API tests
items.last_note: Gate before treating v1 blueprint as complete
